Name: BossEnemyGenerateParam
Description: Defines parameters used for boss moves that trigger enemy generators.

Fields.Name: Dummy Polygon Start ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon on which the generated enemy is spawned.

Fields.Name: Dummy Polygon End ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon on which the generated enemy is spawned.

Fields.Name: Inherit Player Armor
Fields.Description: If enabled, the player armor is inherited by the generated enemy.

Fields.Name: Is Extradimensional
Fields.Description: If enabled, the generated enemy is from another world (mirror break?)
